claim: MacWilliams/Fourier identity expresses M_C(u) as product cosh times Golay shell tanh polynomial
Block-RMS domination lemma bounds each shell A_w(tanh |u|) by A_w(1) r^w
h(x)=log cosh(sqrt x) is concave on x>=0
g(x)=tanh^2(sqrt x) is concave on x>=0
Jensen gives sum log cosh u_i <= 24 log cosh(||u||/sqrt24)
Jensen gives mean tanh^2 u_i <= tanh^2(||u||/sqrt24)
Since W(r) is increasing, log M_C(u) <= 24 log cosh(t)+log W(tanh t), t=||u||/sqrt24
